title: Spunky PVP Plus (Mobile)
description: The best PvP modpack for PojavLauncher with all the essential mods & resource packs that improve your PVP gameplay experience.
body:
**Spunky PvP Plus (Mobile Edition)** is a trimmed-down, mobile-friendly version of the original Spunky PvP Plus modpack. Built for Minecraft 1.20.1 with Fabric, it's made to run smoothly on low-end systems or devices using emulators like **PojavLauncher**. This pack keeps PvP sharp, fast, and responsive without heavy mods slowing you down.

[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eaf23726a62c7c004ca58006fa258b1fd6aeac6.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)

---

## 🎮 What's Different in the Mobile Edition?

This version focuses on **ultra-low-lag performance** and **essential PvP features**, perfect for mobile or low-end PC users. We've removed shader-heavy mods and replaced them with lighter alternatives to ensure smooth combat—even during intense fights also added custom settings for stable gameplay.

---

## ⚡ Performance & Optimization Mods

* **Sodium / Lithium / FerriteCore / ModernFix / Bad Optimizations / C2ME / ImmediatelyFast** – Boost FPS, reduce lag, and improve chunk loading.
* **Entity Culling / MoreCulling / Noisium / ThreadTweak** – Optimized rendering and background performance.

---

## 🔧 PvP Features & Tools

* **Custom Crosshair Mod** – Fully customizable crosshair for better aim.
* **Totem Counter / Potion Counter / Tier Tagger** – Track PvP essentials like totems, potions, and armor.
* **Gamma Utils** – Full brightness always on, no need for night vision.
* **Shulker Box Tooltip / AppleSkin** – Quick access to food values and item previews.
* **ReplayMod** – Record your PvP fights to review and improve later.

---

## 🧩 UI & Quality of Life Mods

* **Mod Menu / Cloth Config / Fabric API / Placeholder API / Ukulib** – Core utility mods to support config and compatibility.
* **Custom HUD / Ukus Armor HUD** – Customize your HUD to show armor, status, and more.
* **No Chat Reports** – Keeps your multiplayer experience safe and private.
* **ViaFabricPlus** – Adds server compatibility for various versions.

---

## 📥 Installation Guide

1. Install **Fabric Loader** (1.20.1)
2. Download all mod `.jar` files into your `mods` folder.
3. Use a launcher like **PojavLauncher** (for Android) or any Fabric-supported launcher for PC.

---

## ✅ Perfect For:

* **Mobile players using emulators or PojavLauncher**
* **PvP players with low-end devices**
* Anyone who wants a **lag-free, clean combat setup**

---
